UNLAWFUL DETAINER MOTION 501, THE COURT ADOPTS IT'S TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT BRYANT EDWARDS LLC'S MOTION TO EXPUNGE NOTICE OF PENDENCY OF ACTION; ALTERNATIVELY TO REQUIRE PLAINTIFF TO FILE UNDERTAKING IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF HAS NOT SHOWN THAT A MONETARY AWARD WILL NOT COVER DAMAGES CAUSED BY THE ALLEGED ENCROACHMENT BY DEFENDANT ONTO PLAINTIFF'S PROPERTY. HEARING HELD REGARDING ATTORNEYS' FEES. THE COURT HAVING REVIEWED THE PLEADINGS AND HAVING HEARD ORAL ARGUMENT RULES AS FOLLOWS: DENIED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED.

MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-06-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO DEVELOPERS, INC MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST MENDED COMPLAINT is granted. No opposition filed. Prevailing party to prepare order. Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not reported (D501)

Notice Of Motion To Expunge Notice Of Pendency Of Action; Alternatively To Require Pltf To File Undertaking
Off Calendar Nov-01-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Joseph Strella, Jr., of Clapp Moroney Bellagamba Vucinich Beeman Scheley, Law Corporation (650-989-5400) for Bryant Edwards, LLC, Defendant and Moving party.
Ron Lunski Esq., of Lunski Law (415-426-3525) for The Lieberman Family 2008 Revocable Trust, dated October 24, 2008, Plaintiff and opposing party.

The Court adopts it's tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT BRYANT EDWARDS LLC's Motion To Expunge Notice Of Pendency Of Action; Alternatively To Require Plaintiff To File Undertaking is Granted. Plaintiff has not shown that a monetary award will not cover damages caused by the alleged encroachment by Defendant onto Plaintiff's property.

Hearing held regarding attorneys' fees. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows: Denied.

Order signed in open Court. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)

MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT

MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO DEVELOPERS, INC.'S MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT.

No appearances. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: The motion is transferred to department 501 to be heard on November 6, 2013. Department 501 handles all real property matters. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Reporter: Tony Vaughn CSR #6185 (302/EHG)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-12-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT BRYANT EDWARDS LLC's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is taken off calendar as moot. A First Amended Complaint was filed on August 19, 2013. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/MJM)
